title: axiom dark mode
description: It's like Axiom, but dark. Probably works for other versions, but i was too lazy to test.
body:
It's the Axiom textures, but in the style of Default Dark Mode.

Probably works in other versions, but i was too lazy to test

.

Do whatever you want with it, no credit needed

For further information, just dm me on discord: Magminz
